intro: Apple sued OpenAI, alleging that former Apple employees now at OpenAI stole hardware trade secrets, with the complaint naming senior leadership involvement. Fidji Simo stepped back from her executive role at OpenAI to an advisory position following medical leave. Meta's AI image detector failed to identify over half of images created by its own Muse Image generator after simple cropping, according to a Reuters analysis.

whitelist.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
whitelist.desc: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that former employees that now work for the AI company have stolen Apple’s trade secrets “for the benefit of OpenAI.”

whitelist.title: Fidji Simo steps back from OpenAI | Fortune
whitelist.desc: And exposes the fragile hold women still have on power.

whitelist.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

whitelist.title: Meta’s detection tool fails to identify photos generated by its own Muse Image AI
whitelist.desc: According to an analysis by Reuters, Meta's AI image detector fails to identify pictures created by Muse Image in more than half the cases after merely cropping the AI-generated photos.

whitelist.title: OpenAI is shutting down its ChatGPT Atlas browser
whitelist.desc: OpenAI will sunset ChatGPT Atlas on 9 August, folding its agentic browsing into a new ChatGPT desktop "super app" as it cuts side projects

whitelist.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
whitelist.desc: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

whitelist.title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
whitelist.desc: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in the Michigan Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4.

whitelist.title: Top OpenAI executive Fidji Simo is stepping down
